name: @c15t/svelte
description: Developer-first CMP for Svelte: cookie banner, consent manager, preferences centre. GDPR ready with minimal setup and rich customization

scripts.build: bun prebuild && svelte-package -o dist && bun run copy:dist:css && bun run clean:dist:test-artifacts
scripts.clean:dist:test-artifacts: bun --eval "import { readdirSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'; import { join } from 'node:path'; const walk = (dir) => { for (const entry of readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true })) { const full = join(dir, entry.name); if (entry.isDirectory()) { if (entry.name === '__tests__') { rmSync(full, { recursive: true, force: true }); continue; } walk(full); continue; } if (/\.(test|spec)\.[cm]?[jt]sx?$/.test(entry.name)) { rmSync(full, { force: true }); } } }; walk('dist');"
scripts.copy:dist:css: bun --eval "import { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; import { dirname, join } from 'node:path'; const copy = (sourceRel, targetRel) => { const source = join(process.cwd(), sourceRel); const target = join(process.cwd(), targetRel); if (!existsSync(source)) throw new Error('Missing source CSS asset: ' + source); mkdirSync(dirname(target), { recursive: true }); copyFileSync(source, target); }; copy('src/styles.css', 'dist/styles.css'); copy('src/iab/styles.css', 'dist/iab/styles.css');"
scripts.fmt: bun biome format --write . && bun biome check --formatter-enabled=false --linter-enabled=false --write
